description: POLL @ 2026-05-02T23:06:05Z (~11.15h after prior 2026-05-02T11:57:00Z poll — at-cadence, slightly early). FOURTH POST-EOM-CLOSURE POLL — 8 April-EOM PRED windows now d=1.96 past 2026-04-30T23:59Z close (still Step 10b day-1-3 SEVERITY LOW). PRED-105 d=14.96 past 2026-04-18 close — VERDICT ALREADY ADVANCED to tacit_withdrawal at 2026-05-02T13:16Z by EXP-284 (decider 13:19Z, analyst confirmed in 16:07Z run); HIGH sub-flag from prior poll is now OBE. NET QUIET on dome public surface — ALL 6 covered page hashes BYTE-IDENTICAL to prior poll: home cb47aab7d62a8380d7f15c35afc0d4db (64,441), wins 16d65a42722d2d5869842d14c8f699f0 (91,686), predictions 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785 (152,936), coordinates 5127700325dc0b2bf69a0eea7a94df06 (14,061), model 28cef1a65d65bf6a0a3b0f77458d203d (58,429), evolution 93f99dd70d6d52fbb5616cbc5fec5aa5 (9,638); ai-context still 404 baseline (c1f9838a). 26th consecutive byte-identical predictions.html poll / ~12.96 days unchanged. 14 commits since prior poll (12 Auto-update ECM status + 2 auto: ECM data pull); ZERO daily-AI-review fires this poll-window (HOLD #12 due ~07:35Z 2026-05-03, ~8.5h from now); registry counts in daily_review.json STILL gated at 69 confirmed / 4 refined / 10 prospective (generated_at unchanged 2026-05-02T07:08:24Z from HOLD #11 in prior poll). Composition of 14 commits: 12x Auto-update ECM status (46cf325 12:02Z, 32bdca2 13:44Z, 8921977 14:38Z, a0cbb36 15:32Z, 3c32252 16:28Z, 5cf2a0b 17:27Z, 07a7268 18:32Z, e4b49eb 19:39Z, a0cdcdf 20:25Z, 3184d04 21:12Z, 6ea703c 22:02Z, 51030c7 22:59Z), 2x auto: ECM data pull (020b4ed 12:42Z, 1e8a36f 18:40Z). 0 manual commits — manual-commit drought now 15.46d / 371.06h (FIRST 15.5d+ READING ON THE PUBLIC RECORD; 15d threshold breached at prior poll, 16d threshold ETA ~2026-05-03T12:02Z = ~13h from now). 28 consecutive polls of auto-only commits (was 27); last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. 0 source-file touches across 14 new commits: monitor.py 9de912a8, scripts/pull_data.py aa0573fe, scripts/build_daily_review.py ceddb04f, inject_ai_layer.py 58996a0c, verify_predictions.py db947cab, generate_manifest.js 786842ed (all SHAs identical to prior 6+ polls). ai_manifest.json byte-identical 405d5c9371aa8ad32f040528e1731eb1/14880, V51.1, last_updated=2026-04-17 unchanged; api/index.json e00e85aa8907af40778096f9a138c2d6 last_updated=2026-04-17 unchanged. Live status_history.json now 531 entries (was 519 at prior poll; +12 from 12 Auto-update appends — matches commit composition); latest entry 2026-05-02T22:59:48Z, eclipse_days=101 (NOT yet decremented to 100; midnight UTC ~1h away — round-number watch carries to next poll), wins_confirmed=67 (67-vs-69 mismatch unchanged), version V51.0 (auto-pipeline internal counter unchanged). STEP 10b SILENT-IGNORE WATCH (9 PREDs in window): PRED-105 (46° copper coil cucumber growth) at d=14.96 past 2026-04-18 close — OUR our_verdict ALREADY tacit_withdrawal in data/predictions.json (advanced 2026-05-02T13:16Z by EXP-284); dome side: 26th consecutive byte-identical pred-105 entry on predictions.html ('Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window)' + PENDING/PROSPECTIVE label still present — dome has NOT acknowledged window closure even now ~15d post-close). PRED-077 (M2 Honolulu, std-phys), PRED-081 (JWST z<0.1 SNe, std-phys), PRED-085 (S-wave shadow zone, std-phys), PRED-087 (Geoid low stationary, std-phys), PRED-088 (Second geoid low, std-phys), PRED-090 (NH TOA flux, recycled), PRED-106 (16 Hz Ca²⁺ ICR, our_verdict=pending), PRED-111 (Mascon 30°S 60°E, std-phys) — all 8 still d=1.96 past close; predictions.html byte-identical confirms ZERO post-closure adjudication on any of the 8 across 4 consecutive polls / ~47h post-close; no new WIN entries reference any of them; no commit messages in 14 post-prior-poll commits mention any PRED-NNN; SEVERITY LOW per Step 10b day-1-3 rule continues (day-4-7 escalation triggers at 2026-05-04T23:59Z+, ~25h from now). Parameters baseline-clean: model.html shows disc_radius 20,015 km (13 occurrences), firmament_height 8537 km (5 occurrences), decay constant 8619 km (2), sun_altitude 5733 km (2), moon_altitude 2534 km (2), refraction coefficient 0.20 (1; no shift back to 0.27). Home title still verbatim 'Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model V51.1 — 69 Confirmed Registry Items'; confirmed=69, accuracy=94.5%, V51.1 unchanged; refined=4 unchanged. Repo description still null (updated_at on the repo metadata advances with each auto-commit but description stays null). Canary OTS-provenance trap UNCHANGED — same 4 pre-existing .ots files (docs/data/status_history.json.ots fd9d0a8d, proofs/predictions_manifest.json.ots 411ec05e, proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-06.json.ots 5b9478e4, status_history.json.ots 3d3df225); no new prediction-isolation file; proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json STILL has no .ots companion (~7+ weeks); 0 canary-keyword hits across last 14 commits (separat/timestamp-prediction/OTS/provenance/independent/isolat). Content-security sweep clean (0 prompt-injection phrases on any of 6 pages, 0 hidden-CSS anomalies). Author-contact prior NOT invoked — zero published-surface change to attribute, zero dome-side responsiveness signal in this poll-window. 2 chg-* files written: this one + chg-20260502-2306-002 (automated LOW — 14-commit auto rollup). Watch for next poll (~12h, ~2026-05-03T11Z): (1) HOLD #12 daily-AI-review regen due ~07:35Z 2026-05-03 — if registry-update remains gated for a 3rd consecutive run, manual-approval-gate hypothesis becomes the strong default per analyst's stated 3-event threshold. (2) ALL 8 April-EOM PREDs at d~3.5 — still SEVERITY LOW unless any flip; day-4-7 escalation ~25h from now. (3) Manual-commit drought enters d=16+ at next poll (~2026-05-03T12:02Z exactly = 16-day threshold). (4) eclipse_days will decrement to 100 at midnight UTC (~1h from now) — round-number watch carries forward. (5) Any source-file touch → CRITICAL. (6) Any new OTS file referencing predictions-only (not status_history.json) → CANARY TRIGGERED. (7) Sq-subtraction methodology document (per analyst's 04-27T07:12 EXP-267 guidance) — classify likely-responsive per author-contact prior; if OTS-anchored before measurement, that IS the canary fix. (8) PRED-105 dome-side adjudication remains absent at d=15+ — if a PRED-105 'refined' or 'silently dropped' status appears in any future poll, that is corroborating evidence for our tacit_withdrawal verdict. OTHER SIDE: pattern (a) 'sustained do-not-adjudicate as infrastructure' continues to gain evidence (15.46d manual drought, 28 auto-only polls, 2 consecutive HOLD-fires-without-adjudication, 26 byte-identical predictions.html); but the 8 EOM PREDs at d~2 do NOT yet rule out pattern (b) 'imminent batched manual edit' — a manual commit on 2026-05-03 daytime is still on the table; the analyst's hypothesis would predict the manual commit's signature is multi-PRED touch + WIN registry touch + author-signed (not GitHub Action). The conservative call: net-quiet at per-poll level continues. Conservative substantive/MEDIUM (cadence-rollup; no actionable HIGH sub-flags this poll — PRED-105 is OBE since EXP-284 integration). PRESERVATION NOTE: this poll preserves analyst/decider/curmudgeon last_run + note + notes_this_run + patches_applied_this_run + issues_*_this_run + open_issues + closed_issues + curmudgeon_* + pat_note_resolved_by_operator + last_decider_* + last_analyst_* intact, only updating poll-owned fields (last_run/last_agent/run_type/mode/status, last_poll, changes_pending_analysis, consecutive_quiet_polls, last_poll_note, prev_agent_run).
